ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of performance metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device for which the metric is recorded */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operating conditions */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric type (e.g., receiver, transmitter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., module, gateway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating condition */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rf_sensitivities" (
  "sensitivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RF sensitivity value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "spreading_factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spreading factor */,
  "bandwidth_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bandwidth */,
  "sensitivity_value" REAL /* Sensitivity value in dBm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensitivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_sensitivities_bandwidth_id FOREIGN KEY ("bandwidth_id") REFERENCES bandwidths ("bandwidth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_sensitivities_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_sensitivities_spreading_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("spreading_factor_id") REFERENCES spreading_factors ("spreading_factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spreading_factors" (
  "spreading_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spreading factor */,
  "spreading_factor_value" TEXT /* Value of the spreading factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spreading factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spreading_factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bandwidths" (
  "bandwidth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bandwidth */,
  "bandwidth_value" TEXT /* Value of the bandwidth */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bandwidth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bandwidth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that the user belongs to (e.g., R&D, QA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_mode_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operating mode */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_mode_configs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_mode_configs_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES operating_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
